h9427de83g9d89g4da3g902fgb97888684d65: Thanks for fighting off those goblins. If you need to replace any gear, just ask.
h651e8fc3g09d5g4ecag9a72g082338496070: My selection's pretty slim. I had to leave most of my equipment in Elturel.
h5c2eb75fg2decg485bga5a5gc3d55dbc7285: That forge is holding on by a thread. Are you a smith?
h3c6035e6gb212g46b8g96d8gbd208a87f1dd: The best. People came from as far as Neverwinter to buy my swords.
h3b9a8563gcd7ag4919g8342g3c9add350cc1: Funny how things change when your bloodline becomes a problem.
h0fb5e7aagc77ag4742g8a9agcaa9da1d81e2: Guess I'll be starting over in Baldur's Gate. I hope people are more open-minded there.
habd039d1gb257g4c94gb7degd9434df27c61: I was trained to fight bare-handed. Not really one for weapons.
he08f92c1g3ff4g4e10g94a8g285cb5fe090e: Might have to teach the rest of us that trick, then.
h289034a4g69b8g41c1g9053g827937f5f090: Expect half these blades will break the first time they strike a goblin skull. I've had to improvise.
hb9128d9cg7109g4920g9df4g476bf6f154d7: Looking for steel? I have... well, something close.
hcedd0c32g24efg4980gb077g2f39196d0df7: I'm packing for Baldur's Gate, but anything you need? You've got it.
